key_takeaways: Map your 5 stories to 30+ potential questions — one story, many applications
Leadership principles: Amazon 14, Flipkart equivalents — know which ones are weighted
Practice aloud: recording > writing. Timing matters: 2-3 min each, not 5+
After answer: pivot to this role — 'This is why I'm excited about [company]'
Research: read company blog, recent news, team structure before interview
'Tell me about yourself' is your brand statement — make it compelling and specific
reflection.next_topic_preview: Module 44 done! Next: M45 Mock Interviews.
